questions.question_text: You have taken the wrong road and are required to turn around. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.
answers.2: I drive up to the opening in the central reservation and hold back for any oncoming drivers.
answers.3: I turn immediately to the left through the opening in the central reservation.
answers.4: I continue straight ahead at the intersection and find another place to turn left.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with the slowly moving passenger car in front. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.2: I increase my speed and overtake.
answers.3: I remain behind the vehicle in front.
answers.4: I increase my safety distance to the vehicle in front.

questions.question_text: What does the hand signal given by the police officer mean for you?

answers.1: I have a duty to stop.
answers.2: I am permitted to turn left at the intersection.
answers.3: I am permitted to turn right at the intersection.
answers.4: I am permitted to drive straight ahead at the intersection.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 70 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I reduce my speed.
answers.2: I am ready to brake quickly.
answers.3: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the traffic lane.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of possible obstacles on the other side of the hilltop.

questions.question_text: You are looking for a parking space nearby. How do you proceed now?

answers.1: I drive up to the intersection and look to my side.
answers.2: If the lane is clear, I continue straight ahead at the intersection.
answers.3: When the lane is clear, I have to turn left at the intersection.
answers.4: I hope that there is another parking space nearby.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I may drive at a maximum of 50 km/h in the centre lane.
answers.2: If I am driving at less than 50 km/h, I must use the far right lane.
answers.3: If I am driving at more than 50 km/h, I must use the far right lane.
answers.4: It is prohibited to use the lane on the right, as it is reserved for trucks and buses.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of a railroad crossing with barriers ahead.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of a railroad crossing without barriers ahead.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of a dead-end road.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 60 km/h and wish to enter the motorway to the left. There is no traffic in your blind spot. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I activate my left indicator.
answers.3: I merge into the motorway in front of the truck.
answers.4: I brake and wait before changing traffic lanes.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of buses.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the condition of the traffic lane.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the traffic lights.

questions.question_text: You have reduced your speed to 20 to 30 km/h because the traffic lane narrows. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at the same speed or at a slightly higher speed.
answers.2: I stop and wait for the oncoming traffic.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of whether the oncoming driver is waiting for me.
answers.4: The oncoming traffic should hold back for me.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead. How will you continue?

answers.1: I pull over to the left side of the road.
answers.2: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I hold back for the oncoming traffic.

questions.question_text: You are about to catch up with the driver in front, who is travelling at approximately 60 km/h. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.2: I overtake the passenger car.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I wait a little longer before overtaking the driver in front.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. There are no road users behind you. The oncoming truck is about to turn right into the side road. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming truck.
answers.2: I pull further over to the right of the traffic lane.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I hold back for the oncoming traffic.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am permitted to turn right at the intersection.
answers.2: It is prohibited to turn right at the intersection.
answers.3: I am permitted to turn left at the intersection.
answers.4: It is prohibited to turn left at the intersection.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h and the driver behind has caught up with you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I pull over to the right.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I stop completely.

questions.question_text: You are about to move off from a parking space. What must you be particularly mindful of?

answers.1: I must wait for the tractor coming from the left.
answers.2: The tractor from the left must wait for me.
answers.3: I must wait for any traffic coming from the right.
answers.4: I must wait for any traffic coming from the left.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead. How will you continue here?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I pull further over to the right of the traffic lane.
answers.3: I stop before the crosswalk.

questions.question_text: You intend to turn left at this intersection. What must you be particularly mindful of?

answers.1: I wait for passenger cars and motorcycles coming from the right.
answers.2: I wait for passenger cars and motorcycles coming from the left.
answers.3: I wait for bicyclists coming from the right.
answers.4: I wait for bicyclists coming from the left.

questions.question_text: You are about to enter a motorway, but the driver in front is hesitating about merging. There are no road users behind you in the nearest motorway lane. How will you continue?

answers.1: I apply my service brake.
answers.2: I remain behind the drivers in front for the time being.
answers.3: I drive into the motorway across the broken lines immediately.
answers.4: I continue in the access lane for a while longer.

questions.question_text: The driver has stepped out of the grey passenger car here. According to the legal provisions on stopping and parking, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for up to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
answers.3: Stopping in the viaduct is prohibited.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with the slowly moving truck, and you want to get ahead quickly. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a signal for overtaking with the horn.
answers.2: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.3: I overtake.
answers.4: I reduce my speed and remain behind the truck.

questions.question_text: You are required to continue straight ahead at the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the pedestrian.
answers.2: I look to see what is happening on both sides before I drive into the intersection.
answers.3: There is a duty to give way to all traffic at the intersection.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that I am driving into an area with speed suppression measures.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 20 to 30 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of 20 to 30 km/h.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the bicyclist in front.
answers.3: I brake hard immediately.
answers.4: I pull further over to the left of the traffic lane.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
answers.3: Stopping is prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
answers.3: Stopping and parking the passenger car are prohibited here.
